div1.entryFree:
Sweetheart, 1) mistress: take your --'s hat, Wint. IV, 4, 664.
In all the other passages, where the word is found, it is used as a tender address, and ought to be written in two words (which is, indeed, the prevalent spelling of O. Edd.): Wiv. IV, 2, 12. V, 5, 26. All's II, 3, 285. All's II, 3, 285 Tw. I, 3, 75. III, 4, 33. H4B II, 4, 24. H4B II, 4, 24 H8 I, 4, 94. Rom. IV, 5, 3 (cf. Sweet).
2) Name of a dog: the little dogs and all, Tray, Blanch, and S., see, they bark at me, Lr. III, 6, 66.
